statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.outputFormat: Returns True or False to indicate if the parentheses are balanced.

starterCode.cpp: class Solution { public: bool check(string s) { vector<char> stack; for (char c : s) { if (c == '(') stack.push_back(c); else stack.pop_back(); } return stack.empty(); } };
starterCode.java: class Solution { public boolean check(String s) { java.util.Stack<Character> stack = new java.util.Stack<Character>(); for (char c : s.toCharArray()) { if (c == '(') stack.push(c); else stack.pop(); } return stack.isEmpty(); } }
starterCode.python: class Solution: def check(self, s: str) -> bool: stack = []; for c in s: if c == '(': stack.append(c); else stack.pop(); return not stack;
starterCode.javascript: class Solution { check(s) { let stack = []; for (let c of s) { if (c == '(') stack.push(c); else stack.pop(); } return stack.length == 0; } }

buggyStarterCode.cpp: class Solution { public: bool check(string s) { vector<char> stack; for (char c : s) { if (c == '(') stack.push_back(c); else stack.pop_front(); } return stack.empty(); } };
buggyStarterCode.java: class Solution { public boolean check(String s) { java.util.Stack<Character> stack = new java.util.Stack<Character>(); for (char c : s.toCharArray()) { if (c == '(') stack.push(c); else stack.popFront(); } return stack.isEmpty(); } }
buggyStarterCode.python: class Solution: def check(self, s: str) -> bool: stack = []; for c in s: if c == '(': stack.append(c); else stack.pop(0); return not stack;
buggyStarterCode.javascript: class Solution { check(s) { let stack = []; for (let c of s) { if (c == '(') stack.push(c); else stack.pop(0); } return stack.length == 0; } }

solutions.cpp: #include <iostream> #include <stack> #include <string> int main() { std::string s = "((()))"; Solution solution; if (solution.check(s)) std::cout << "True"; else std::cout << "False"; return 0; } bool Solution::check(const std::string &s) { std::stack<char> stack; for (char c : s) { if (c == '(') stack.push(c); else if (!stack.empty()) stack.pop(); } return stack.empty(); }
